rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"lesson","text":"The Kody engine source lives in a separate repo (aharonyaircohen/Kody-ADE-Engine), while the test runner/validation logic is in this repo — source-level changes require working across both.","scope":"repo architecture"},{"kind":"convention","text":"E2E test suites (like P3T19) are named with pipeline prefixes and run as triggered Kody pipeline stages rather than as standard unit tests.","scope":"pipeline conventions"}]}
